case_title: FREDERICK BOWLES VS. LUIS-ALBERTO A. BARRIOS PEREZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED JUN-03-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS PEREZ, LUIS-ALBERTO A.
DECLARATION OF ADDRESS UPDATE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BARRIOS PEREZ, LUIS-ALBERTO A.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-10-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FREDERICK BOWLES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS-ALBERTO A. BARRIOS PEREZ IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARACIA. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: PAYMENTS WILL BE MADE BY MONEY ORDER AND MAILED TO 2610 HILLEGASS AVENUE #105, BERKELEY, CA 94704. EACH PAYMENT WILL BE $250 FOR 22 WEEKS AND A FINAL PAYMENT ON THE 23RD WEEK OF $70. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-10-2020 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE JAN-10-2020 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,304.23 FILED BY BOWLES, FREDERICK AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS PEREZ, LUIS-ALBERTO A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
